Package calendar.event

Class EventSeries.EventSeriesBuilder

  • java.lang.Object
    • calendar.event.EventSeries.EventSeriesBuilder
  • Enclosing class:
    EventSeries
    public static class EventSeries.EventSeriesBuilder
extends java.lang.Object
    Builder class for creating and reset instances.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor Description
      EventSeriesBuilder​(java.lang.String subject, java.time.LocalDateTime start, java.lang.String weekdays)
      Constructs a new builder with mandatory parameters.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      EventSeries build()
      Builds and returns the event series object.
      EventSeries.EventSeriesBuilder description​(java.lang.String description)
      Sets the descriptive text for the event series.
      EventSeries.EventSeriesBuilder end​(java.time.LocalDateTime end)
      Sets the end time for the event series.
      EventSeries.EventSeriesBuilder location​(java.lang.String location)
      Sets the location for the event series.
      EventSeries.EventSeriesBuilder occurrences​(java.lang.Integer occurrences)
      Sets the maximum number of occurrences for the series.
      EventSeries.EventSeriesBuilder setAllDay()
      Marks the event series as an all-day event.
      EventSeries.EventSeriesBuilder setEndDate​(java.time.LocalDate endDate)
      Sets the end date of the event series.
      EventSeries.EventSeriesBuilder status​(java.lang.String status)
      Sets the status of the event series.
      EventSeries.EventSeriesBuilder withExistingId​(java.lang.String seriesId)
      Sets an existing series ID for updating an existing series.
      EventSeries.EventSeriesBuilder withExistingRemovedDates​(java.util.Set<java.time.LocalDate> removedDates)
      Includes a set of dates that have been removed from the series.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • EventSeriesBuilder

        public EventSeriesBuilder​(java.lang.String subject,
                          java.time.LocalDateTime start,
                          java.lang.String weekdays)
        Constructs a new builder with mandatory parameters.
        Parameters:
        subject - the subject of the series
        start - the start date and time of the first occurrence
        weekdays - a string representing the recurrence days

    • Method Detail

      • end

        public EventSeries.EventSeriesBuilder end​(java.time.LocalDateTime end)
        Sets the end time for the event series.
        Parameters:
        end - the end date and time
        Returns:
        the builder instance

      • setAllDay

        public EventSeries.EventSeriesBuilder setAllDay()
        Marks the event series as an all-day event.
        Returns:
        the builder instance.

      • withExistingId

        public EventSeries.EventSeriesBuilder withExistingId​(java.lang.String seriesId)
        Sets an existing series ID for updating an existing series.
        Parameters:
        seriesId - the existing unique ID of the series
        Returns:
        the builder instance

      • withExistingRemovedDates

        public EventSeries.EventSeriesBuilder withExistingRemovedDates​(java.util.Set<java.time.LocalDate> removedDates)
        Includes a set of dates that have been removed from the series.
        Parameters:
        removedDates - the set of removed dates
        Returns:
        the builder instance

      • occurrences

        public EventSeries.EventSeriesBuilder occurrences​(java.lang.Integer occurrences)
        Sets the maximum number of occurrences for the series.
        Parameters:
        occurrences - the number of times the event occurs
        Returns:
        the builder instance

      • setEndDate

        public EventSeries.EventSeriesBuilder setEndDate​(java.time.LocalDate endDate)
        Sets the end date of the event series.
        Parameters:
        endDate - the end date of the series
        Returns:
        the builder instance

      • description

        public EventSeries.EventSeriesBuilder description​(java.lang.String description)
        Sets the descriptive text for the event series.
        Parameters:
        description - the description
        Returns:
        the builder instance

      • location

        public EventSeries.EventSeriesBuilder location​(java.lang.String location)
        Sets the location for the event series.
        Parameters:
        location - the location string
        Returns:
        the builder instance

      • status

        public EventSeries.EventSeriesBuilder status​(java.lang.String status)
        Sets the status of the event series.
        Parameters:
        status - the status string ("private" or "public")
        Returns:
        the builder instance

      • build

        public EventSeries build()
        Builds and returns the event series object.
        Returns:
        an EventSeries instance.
